architect.light: Hi {name}! You treat 'final' like a suggestion and 'minimal' like a personality trait.
architect.contractor: Hi {name}! You moved the stair again. The contractor felt that in their soul.
architect.nuclear: Hi {name}! Fourteen stair revisions and you still call it minimalism. Bold.

engineer.light: Hi {name}! Your redlines are so thorough, even the redlines get redlines.
engineer.contractor: Hi {name}! You discovered the drawings were wrong eight minutes after mobilization. Classic.
engineer.nuclear: Hi {name}! Your entire personality is calculations in blue text. Even lunch has a markup.

contractor.light: Hi {name}! You treat every RFI like it personally offended your crew.
contractor.contractor: Hi {name}! You mobilized before the ink dried on the permit set. Respect.
contractor.nuclear: Hi {name}! Your schedule says done. Reality says see you next fiscal year.

gc.light: Hi {name}! You run coordination meetings that need their own coordination meeting.
gc.contractor: Hi {name}! Your submittal log is longer than the building code. Impressive.
gc.nuclear: Hi {name}! You promised float. The float filed for bankruptcy.

owner.light: Hi {name}! You want champagne finishes on a soda budget. We admire the optimism.
owner.contractor: Hi {name}! Every meeting adds scope. Every scope adds a smile. Then VE.
owner.nuclear: Hi {name}! Luxury on a VE budget is your love language. The team speaks fluent panic.

bim manager.light: Hi {name}! You're basically a therapist for Navisworks clashes. How are you holding up?
bim manager.contractor: Hi {name}! Your federated model has more drama than a design charrette.
bim manager.nuclear: Hi {name}! LOD 400 promise, LOD 200 reality. The gap is structural.

pm.light: Hi {name}! Your action items have action items. It's action items all the way down.
pm.contractor: Hi {name}! The Gantt chart says green. The field says lol.
pm.nuclear: Hi {name}! You scheduled a meeting to discuss why there are too many meetings. Hero.

specifier.light: Hi {name}! Your spec section has more addenda than the base document. Poetry.
specifier.contractor: Hi {name}! 'Or equal' is doing a lot of work in your Division 08 section.
specifier.nuclear: Hi {name}! Three pages to say 'use the good one.' Masterful.

default.light: Hi {name}! Your coordination confidence is lower than a Monday morning submittal queue.
default.contractor: Hi {name}! You treat RFIs like a hobby and deadlines like a rumor.
default.nuclear: Hi {name}! Even CODiii's compliance scan needed a coffee after reviewing your workflow.
